raw_transcript: I am so sorry. This is a classic case of recurrent Clostridioides difficile, or C. diff. Every time we take general antibiotics, they wipe out the good bacteria in your gut, and the C. diff spores take over. Since this is your third recurrence, we need a more durable solution than just standard Vancomycin.
